title: Vechir na Ivana Kupala
actors: Boris Khmelnitskiy, Larisa Kadochnikova, Yefim Fridman
plot: Piotr is a humble farm laborer living in a poor village. He wants to marry the beautiful Pidorka, but her father doesn't want to. Fortunately, the mischievous demon Bassaruv, who is at large in the country, offers him a deal.
